shadow_event.query: 点击状态栏 有时候没有反应； 或比较慢；

transcript.content: 已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：
这两个做重了吧，应该合并成1个； 先简短展示，点击后，出一个小窗口，在展示详情； 可以自己动态更新的； live pannel.md可以去除掉了；
已经按你说的收成一条了： - `Project Assistant` 的接线我撤回了 - 改成一个独立扩展 `Codex Context Monitor` - 状态栏现在应该只做 `简短展示` - 点击后打开 `小窗口详情` - 详情窗口会跟着后台轮询自动更新 - `live-panel.md` 已经删掉，不再作为主入口
打开新窗口后 Codex Context Monitor 会自动更新到新窗口么？
会，但有边界。 按现在这个 standalone 扩展的实现：
codex context meter 删除掉； 新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要 tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要 果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要
已经改了，而且只改独立扩展。 现在的行为是：
点击状态栏 有时候没有反应； 或比较慢；

decision.archive_summary: Older setup/history is resolved: there was prior confusion about Project Assistant integration, then the work was moved to a standalone extension and the miswiring was reverted. Durable requirements to keep as semantic pins: keep clear boundaries and do not touch Project Assistant; use one merged standalone extension with concise status-bar text and click-to-open detail popup that can update dynamically; remove codex context meter; when no workspace, show 'Ctx: no workspace' and explain the bound workspace path in the tooltip; each VS Code window refreshes independently for its own workspace.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest turn is still on the same active topic: behavior of the standalone status-bar extension, specifically click responsiveness. The current bug depends on recent raw context that defines what clicking should do and current window/workspace behavior, so keep the recent product/behavior turns raw. Earlier turns about why Project Assistant was involved are now resolved and can leave the next-turn prompt, while their durable boundary rule should survive as pins.

applied.archiveSummary: Older setup/history is resolved: there was prior confusion about Project Assistant integration, then the work was moved to a standalone extension and the miswiring was reverted. Durable requirements to keep as semantic pins: keep clear boundaries and do not touch Project Assistant; use one merged standalone extension with concise status-bar text and click-to-open detail popup that can update dynamically; remove codex context meter; when no workspace, show 'Ctx: no workspace' and explain the bound workspace path in the tooltip; each VS Code window refreshes independently for its own workspace.
